Proxy: share biogas over total biogas + natural gas.

Unnamed: 10: Source: IEA + CIA. Estimates are obtained as ratio of biogas production over total production of bio and natural gas. See file biogas/biomethane_TAC_2022.11.03
D.35.3:
Proxy: ratio of heating and cooling from renewable sources out of total in %.
Assumptions: heating is mostly from fossil and cooling from electricity; heating and cooling have equal weight in terms of energy demand. 
Calculation: TAC =  0.5 * 0 + 0.5 TAC(D.35.11) .
